zh.Use the swap booster to change the place: 使用交换助推器交换两个饼干的位置！
zh.Use the star wand to crush one cookie!: 使用星星魔杖粉碎一个饼干！
zh.Use the horizontal pin to clear the whol: 使用横向销钉清除整行！
zh.Use the vertical pin to clear the whole: 使用纵向销钉清除整列！
zh.Nice job! You earned 3 stars! Enjoy your: 干得好！你获得了3颗星！享受你的礼物！
zh.Nice job! You won 3 times in a row! Enjo: 干得好！你连续赢了3次！享受你的礼物！
zh.You watched all videos for today. Come b: 你今天已观看所有视频。明天再来！
zh.This is how you Match 3 Cookies: 这就是如何配对3个饼干
zh.The cookies are on waffles! Save them by: 饼干在华夫饼上！通过配对拯救它们！
zh.Keep matching and remove all waffles!: 继续配对并移除所有华夫饼！
zh.Save the cookies from the blocker by mat: 通过配对从阻挡物中拯救饼干！
zh.Make matches around the ice to break it!: 在冰周围配对以打破它！
zh.Stones block the cookies! Match blocked: 石头阻挡饼干！配对被阻挡的饼干以移除石头！
zh.Crunch! Now, collect more delicious blue: 咔嚓！现在收集更多美味的蓝色饼干！
zh.Stop infections from spreading! Make a m: 阻止感染扩散！在感染旁配对以移除它！
zh.Bring the strawberries to the bottom of: 通过在草莓下方配对将它们带到底部！
zh.Did you notice? Matching 4 gives you a s: 你注意到了吗？配对4个会有特别惊喜！
zh.Crunch! Now reach 2000 Points in 24 Move: 咔嚓！现在在24次移动内达到2000分！
zh.Nice! Now match the bombs to make cookie: 好！现在配对炸弹让饼干爆炸！
zh.Match around the Ice to break it!: 在冰周围配对以打破它！
zh.Great! Now break all the ice and collect: 太棒了！现在打破所有冰块，收集你的华夫饼！
zh.This ice is stronger! Match twice to bre: 这个冰更坚固！配对两次以打破它！
zh.Now that's crunchy! Break it all! Fast!: 现在真脆！快点全部打破！
zh.Match next to Chests to unlock them!: 在宝箱旁配对以解锁它们！
zh.Coins galor! Now collect your Waffles an: 大量金币！现在收集你的华夫饼和樱桃派！
zh.Hey! You can Match 5 with your new Boost: 嘿！你可以用新助推器配对5个！
zh.Try your new Booster to help you Match m: 试试你的新助推器，帮助你配对更多！
zh.Yum! Chocolate Waffles! They require two: 好吃！巧克力华夫饼！需要配对两次才能收集！
zh.Choco-tastic! Now collect the items in 2: 巧克力棒极了！现在在25次移动内收集物品！
zh.Try this and see what happens!: 试试看，看看会发生什么！
zh.Come back tomorrow for more rewards!: 明天再来领取更多奖励！
zh.Use these to boost your game!: 使用这些提升你的游戏！
zh.Use the swap booster to change the place: 使用交换助推器交换两个饼干的位置！
zh.Use the star wand to crush one cookie!\": 使用星星魔杖粉碎一个饼干！

tr.Watch a video to continue playing!: Oynamaya devam etmek için video izle!
tr.Use the swap booster to change the place: İki kurabiyenin yerini değiştirmek için takas güçlendiricisini kullan!
tr.Use the star wand to crush one cookie!: Bir kurabiyeyi ezmek için yıldız değneğini kullan!
tr.Use the horizontal pin to clear the whol: Bütün sırayı temizlemek için yatay pimi kullan!
tr.Use the vertical pin to clear the whole: Bütün sütunu temizlemek için dikey pimi kullan!
tr.Nice job! You earned 3 stars! Enjoy your: Aferin! 3 yıldız kazandın! Hediyenin tadını çıkar!
tr.Nice job! You won 3 times in a row! Enjo: Aferin! Üst üste 3 kez kazandın! Hediyenin tadını çıkar!
tr.Watch video to get more: Daha fazlasını almak için video izle
tr.You watched all videos for today. Come b: Bugün tüm videoları izledin. Yarın tekrar gel!
tr.The cookies are on waffles! Save them by: Kurabiyeler waffle’ın üzerinde! Eşleştirerek onları kurtar!
tr.Keep matching and remove all waffles!: Eşleştirmeye devam et ve tüm waffle’ları kaldır!
tr.Stones block the cookies! Match blocked: Taşlar kurabiyeleri engelliyor! Taşları kaldırmak için engellenmiş kurabiyeleri eşleştir!
tr.Crunch! Now, collect more delicious blue: Kıtır! Şimdi daha fazla lezzetli mavi kurabiye topla!
tr.Stop infections from spreading! Make a m: Enfeksiyonların yayılmasını durdur! Enfeksiyonun yanına eşleştirerek kaldır!
tr.I need help with a gate!: Bir kapı için yardıma ihtiyacım var!
tr.Bring the strawberries to the bottom of: Çilekleri alt kısma indir, altlarında eşleştirerek!
tr.Did you notice? Matching 4 gives you a s: Dikkat ettin mi? 4 eşleştirmek özel bir sürpriz verir!
tr.Nice! Now match the bombs to make cookie: Güzel! Şimdi bombaları eşleştir ve kurabiyeleri patlat!
tr.Great! Now break all the ice and collect: Harika! Şimdi bütün buzu kır ve waffle’larını topla!
tr.Nice! Keep playing to 500 points!: Güzel! 500 puana kadar oynamaya devam et!
tr.This ice is stronger! Match twice to bre: Bu buz daha güçlü! Kırmak için iki kez eşleştir!
tr.Now that's crunchy! Break it all! Fast!: İşte bu kıtır kıtır! Hepsini kır! Hızlı!
tr.Coins galor! Now collect your Waffles an: Bir sürü madeni para! Şimdi waffle’larını ve kirazlı pastalarını topla!
tr.Try your new Booster to help you Match m: Daha fazla eşleştirmen için yeni güçlendiricini dene!
tr.Yum! Chocolate Waffles! They require two: Mmm! Çikolatalı waffle! Toplamak için iki eşleştirme gerekir!
tr.Try this and see what happens!: Bunu dene ve ne olduğunu gör!
tr.Come back tomorrow for more rewards!: Daha fazla ödül için yarın tekrar gel!
tr.Use the swap booster to change the place: İki kurabiyenin yerini değiştirmek için takas güçlendiricisini kullan!
tr.Use the star wand to crush one cookie!\": Bir kurabiyeyi ezmek için yıldız değneğini kullan!

pt.Watch a video to get: Assista a um vídeo para receber
pt.Your level progress will be lost!: Você perderá o progresso do nível!
pt.Watch a video to continue playing!: Assista a um vídeo para continuar jogando!
pt.Use the swap booster to change the place: Use o impulsionador de troca para mudar o lugar de dois biscoitos!
pt.Use the star wand to crush one cookie!: Use a varinha estrelada para esmagar um biscoito!
pt.Use the horizontal pin to clear the whol: Use o pino horizontal para limpar toda a linha!
pt.Use the vertical pin to clear the whole: Use o pino vertical para limpar toda a coluna!
pt.Nice job! You earned 3 stars! Enjoy your: Bom trabalho! Você ganhou 3 estrelas! Aproveite seu presente!
pt.Nice job! You won 3 times in a row! Enjo: Bom trabalho! Você venceu 3 vezes seguidas! Aproveite seu presente!
pt.Watch video to get more: Assista ao vídeo para ganhar mais
pt.You watched all videos for today. Come b: Você assistiu todos os vídeos de hoje. Volte amanhã!
pt.This is how you Match 3 Cookies: É assim que você combina 3 biscoitos
pt.The cookies are on waffles! Save them by: Os biscoitos estão sobre waffles! Salve-os fazendo combinações!
pt.Keep matching and remove all waffles!: Continue combinando e remova todos os waffles!
pt.Save the cookies from the blocker by mat: Salve os biscoitos do bloqueador combinando-os!
pt.Make matches around the ice to break it!: Faça combinações ao redor do gelo para quebrá-lo!!
pt.Stones block the cookies! Match blocked: Pedras bloqueiam os biscoitos! Combine os biscoitos bloqueados para remover a pedra!
pt.Crunch! Now, collect more delicious blue: Croque! Agora, colecione mais biscoitos azuis deliciosos!
pt.Stop infections from spreading! Make a m: Pare a propagação das infecções! Faça uma combinação ao lado de uma infecção para removê-la!
pt.I need help with a gate!: Preciso de ajuda com um portão!
pt.Bring the strawberries to the bottom of: Leve os morangos para o fundo do tabuleiro combinando abaixo deles!
pt.Watch a video to try again: Assista a um vídeo para tentar novamente
pt.Did you notice? Matching 4 gives you a s: Percebeu? Combinar 4 dá uma surpresa especial!
pt.Crunch! Now reach 2000 Points in 24 Move: Croque! Agora alcance 2000 pontos em 24 movimentos!
pt.Nice! Now match the bombs to make cookie: Legal! Agora combine as bombas para explodir os biscoitos!
pt.Match around the Ice to break it!: Combine ao redor do gelo para quebrá-lo!
pt.Great! Now break all the ice and collect: Ótimo! Agora quebre todo o gelo e colecione seus waffles!
pt.This ice is stronger! Match twice to bre: Este gelo é mais forte! Combine duas vezes para quebrá-lo!
pt.Now that's crunchy! Break it all! Fast!: Agora isso é crocante! Quebre tudo! Rápido!
pt.Match next to Chests to unlock them!: Combine ao lado dos baús para desbloqueá-los!
pt.Coins galor! Now collect your Waffles an: Montes de moedas! Agora colecione seus waffles e tortas de cereja!
pt.Hey! You can Match 5 with your new Boost: Ei! Você pode combinar 5 com seu novo impulsionador!
pt.Try your new Booster to help you Match m: Experimente seu novo impulsionador para ajudar a combinar mais!
pt.Yum! Chocolate Waffles! They require two: Humm! Waffles de chocolate! Precisam de dois combos para serem coletados!
pt.Choco-tastic! Now collect the items in 2: Choco-tástico! Agora colecione os itens em 25 movimentos!
pt.Try this and see what happens!: Tente isso e veja o que acontece!
pt.Use the swap booster to change the place: Use o impulsionador de troca para mudar o lugar de dois biscoitos!
pt.Use the star wand to crush one cookie!\": Use a varinha estrelada para esmagar um biscoito!

pl.Your level progress will be lost!: Twój postęp w poziomie zostanie utracony!
pl.Use the swap booster to change the place: Użyj boostera zamiany, aby zmienić miejscami dwa ciasteczka!
pl.Use the star wand to crush one cookie!: Użyj gwiezdnej różdżki, aby zniszczyć jedno ciasteczko!
pl.Use the horizontal pin to clear the whol: Użyj poziomego pinezki, aby wyczyścić cały wiersz!
pl.Use the vertical pin to clear the whole: Użyj pionowego pinezki, aby wyczyścić całą kolumnę!
pl.Nice job! You earned 3 stars! Enjoy your: Świetna robota! Zdobyłeś 3 gwiazdki! Ciesz się prezentem!
pl.Nice job! You won 3 times in a row! Enjo: Świetna robota! Wygrałeś 3 razy z rzędu! Ciesz się prezentem!
pl.You watched all videos for today. Come b: Obejrzałeś wszystkie filmy na dziś. Wróć jutro!
pl.The cookies are on waffles! Save them by: Ciasteczka są na gofrach! Ratuj je, tworząc dopasowania!
pl.Keep matching and remove all waffles!: Kontynuuj dopasowania i usuń wszystkie gofry!
pl.Save the cookies from the blocker by mat: Ratuj ciasteczka przed blokadą, łącząc je!
pl.Make matches around the ice to break it!: Twórz dopasowania wokół lodu, aby go rozbić!!
pl.Stones block the cookies! Match blocked: Kamienie blokują ciasteczka! Połącz zablokowane ciasteczka, aby usunąć kamień!
pl.Crunch! Now, collect more delicious blue: Chrup! Teraz zbierz więcej pysznych niebieskich ciasteczek!
pl.Stop infections from spreading! Make a m: Powstrzymaj rozprzestrzenianie się infekcji! Stwórz dopasowanie obok infekcji, aby ją usunąć!
pl.Bring the strawberries to the bottom of: Przenieś truskawki na dół planszy, dopasowując poniżej nich!
pl.Crunch! Now reach 2000 Points in 24 Move: Chrup! Teraz zdobądź 2000 punktów w 24 ruchach!
pl.Nice! Now match the bombs to make cookie: Super! Teraz dopasuj bomby, aby wybuchły ciasteczka!
pl.Match around the Ice to break it!: Dopasuj wokół lodu, aby go rozbić!
pl.Great! Now break all the ice and collect: Świetnie! Teraz rozbij cały lód i zbierz swoje gofry!
pl.This ice is stronger! Match twice to bre: Ten lód jest mocniejszy! Dopasuj dwa razy, aby go rozbić!
pl.Now that's crunchy! Break it all! Fast!: To jest chrupiące! Zniszcz wszystko! Szybko!
pl.Match next to Chests to unlock them!: Dopasuj obok skrzyń, aby je odblokować!
pl.Coins galor! Now collect your Waffles an: Mnóstwo monet! Teraz zbierz swoje gofry i wiśniowe ciasta!
pl.Hey! You can Match 5 with your new Boost: Hej! Możesz dopasować 5 za pomocą nowego boostera!
pl.Try your new Booster to help you Match m: Wypróbuj nowy booster, aby pomóc w dopasowywaniu!
pl.Yum! Chocolate Waffles! They require two: Mniam! Czekoladowe gofry! Do zebrania potrzebują dwóch dopasowań!
pl.Choco-tastic! Now collect the items in 2: Czekoladowo! Teraz zbierz przedmioty w 25 ruchach!
pl.Try this and see what happens!: Spróbuj tego i zobacz, co się stanie!
pl.Use the swap booster to change the place: Użyj boostera zamiany, aby zmienić miejscami dwa ciasteczka!
pl.Use the star wand to crush one cookie!\": Użyj gwiezdnej różdżki, aby zniszczyć jedno ciasteczko!

nl.Watch a video to get: Bekijk een video om te krijgen
nl.Your level progress will be lost!: Je voortgang in het level gaat verloren!
nl.Watch a video to continue playing!: Bekijk een video om door te spelen!
nl.Use the swap booster to change the place: Gebruik de swap booster om twee koekjes van plaats te wisselen!
nl.Use the star wand to crush one cookie!: Gebruik de toverstaf om één koekje te breken!
nl.Use the horizontal pin to clear the whol: Gebruik de horizontale pin om een hele rij te wissen!
nl.Use the vertical pin to clear the whole: Gebruik de verticale pin om een hele kolom te wissen!
nl.Nice job! You earned 3 stars! Enjoy your: Goed gedaan! Je hebt 3 sterren verdiend! Geniet van je cadeau!
nl.Nice job! You won 3 times in a row! Enjo: Goed gedaan! Je hebt 3 keer achter elkaar gewonnen! Geniet van je cadeau!
nl.Watch video to get more: Bekijk een video om meer te krijgen
nl.You watched all videos for today. Come b: Je hebt vandaag alle video's bekeken. Kom morgen terug!
nl.The cookies are on waffles! Save them by: De koekjes liggen op wafels! Red ze door combinaties te maken!
nl.Keep matching and remove all waffles!: Blijf combinaties maken en verwijder alle wafels!
nl.Save the cookies from the blocker by mat: Red de koekjes van de blokkering door combinaties te maken!
nl.Make matches around the ice to break it!: Maak combinaties rond het ijs om het te breken!!
nl.Stones block the cookies! Match blocked: Stenen blokkeren de koekjes! Maak combinaties met geblokkeerde koekjes om de steen te verwijderen!
nl.Crunch! Now, collect more delicious blue: Crunch! Verzamel nu meer heerlijke blauwe koekjes!
nl.Stop infections from spreading! Make a m: Voorkom dat infecties zich verspreiden! Maak een combinatie naast een infectie om deze te verwijderen!
nl.Complete missions to receive rewards!: Voltooi missies om beloningen te krijgen!
nl.I need an extra life!: Ik heb een extra leven nodig!
nl.I need help with a gate!: Ik heb hulp nodig bij een poort!
nl.Bring the strawberries to the bottom of: Breng de aardbeien naar de onderkant door eronder combinaties te maken!
nl.Watch a video to try again: Bekijk een video om opnieuw te proberen
nl.Did you notice? Matching 4 gives you a s: Merk je het op? 4 combineren geeft een speciale verrassing!
nl.Crunch! Now reach 2000 Points in 24 Move: Crunch! Bereik nu 2000 punten in 24 zetten!
nl.Nice! Now match the bombs to make cookie: Goed! Maak nu combinaties met bommen om koekjes te laten exploderen!
nl.Match around the Ice to break it!: Maak combinaties rond het ijs om het te breken!
nl.Great! Now break all the ice and collect: Geweldig! Breek nu al het ijs en verzamel je wafels!
nl.This ice is stronger! Match twice to bre: Dit ijs is sterker! Maak twee keer combinaties om het te breken!
nl.Now that's crunchy! Break it all! Fast!: Dat is knapperig! Breek alles! Snel!
nl.Match next to Chests to unlock them!: Maak combinaties naast kisten om ze te ontgrendelen!
nl.Coins galor! Now collect your Waffles an: Munten in overvloed! Verzamel nu je wafels en kersenpasteien!
nl.Hey! You can Match 5 with your new Boost: Hé! Je kunt 5 combineren met je nieuwe booster!
nl.Try your new Booster to help you Match m: Probeer je nieuwe booster om meer te combineren!
nl.Yum! Chocolate Waffles! They require two: Lekker! Chocoladewafels! Ze vereisen twee combinaties om te verzamelen!
nl.Choco-tastic! Now collect the items in 2: Choco-tastisch! Verzamel nu de items in 25 zetten!
nl.Try this and see what happens!: Probeer dit en kijk wat er gebeurt!
nl.Come back tomorrow for more rewards!: Kom morgen terug voor meer beloningen!
nl.Use these to boost your game!: Gebruik deze om je spel te verbeteren!
nl.Use the swap booster to change the place: Gebruik de swap booster om twee koekjes van plaats te wisselen!
nl.Use the star wand to crush one cookie!\": Gebruik de toverstaf om één koekje te breken!

ja.Get more coins: コインをもっと手に入れよう
ja.Watch a video to get: 動画を見て手に入れよう
ja.Your level progress will be lost!: レベルの進行状況が失われます！
ja.Out of moves!: ムーブがなくなりました！
ja.Watch a video to continue playing!: 動画を見て続けてプレイしよう！
ja.Use the swap booster to change the place: スワップブースターを使ってクッキーの位置を入れ替えよう！
ja.Use the star wand to crush one cookie!: スターの杖を使ってクッキーをひとつ壊そう！
ja.Use the horizontal pin to clear the whol: 横ピンを使って一列をクリアしよう！
ja.Use the vertical pin to clear the whole: 縦ピンを使って一列をクリアしよう！
ja.Thanks for watching!: ご視聴ありがとうございます！
ja.No possible match - shuffling: マッチがありません。シャッフル中
ja.Nice job! You earned 3 stars! Enjoy your: よくできました！星3つ獲得！ギフトを楽しんで！
ja.Nice job! You won 3 times in a row! Enjo: 素晴らしい！3連勝！ギフトを楽しんで！
ja.Watch video to get more: もっと手に入れるために動画を見よう
ja.You watched all videos for today. Come b: 今日はすべての動画を視聴しました。明日また来てね！
ja.This is how you Match 3 Cookies: クッキーを3つ揃える方法
ja.The cookies are on waffles! Save them by: クッキーはワッフルの上にある！マッチして救おう！
ja.Nice! Keep playing!: いいね！続けてプレイしよう！
ja.Keep matching and remove all waffles!: マッチし続けてすべてのワッフルを消そう！
ja.Save the cookies from the blocker by mat: ブロッカーからクッキーをマッチして救おう！
ja.Make matches around the ice to break it!: 氷の周りでマッチして壊そう！！
ja.Stones block the cookies! Match blocked: 石がクッキーをブロック！ブロックされたクッキーをマッチして石を取り除こう！
ja.Try your new booster!: 新しいブースターを試そう！
ja.Crunch! Now, collect more delicious blue: クランチ！今度はもっと美味しい青いクッキーを集めよう！
ja.Stop infections from spreading! Make a m: 感染の拡大を止めよう！感染の隣でマッチして取り除こう！
ja.Buy 5 extra moves!: ムーブを5回追加で購入！
ja.Complete missions to receive rewards!: ミッションをクリアして報酬を受け取ろう！
ja.New mission available: 新しいミッションが利用可能
ja.New levels in: 新しいレベルまであと
ja.Offer ends in: オファー終了まであと
ja.Bring the strawberries to the bottom of: イチゴを下に運ぶためにその下でマッチしよう！
ja.Get free gold: 無料ゴールドを手に入れよう
ja.Chest Unlocked: チェストが解除されました
ja.Watch a video to try again: 動画を見て再挑戦しよう
ja.Did you notice? Matching 4 gives you a s: 気づきましたか？4つマッチすると特別なサプライズ！
ja.Crunch! Now reach 2000 Points in 24 Move: クランチ！24ムーブで2000ポイントを目指そう！
ja.Nice! Now match the bombs to make cookie: いいね！今度は爆弾をマッチしてクッキーを爆発させよう！
ja.Match around the Ice to break it!: 氷の周りをマッチして壊そう！
ja.Great! Now break all the ice and collect: すごい！今度は氷を全部壊してワッフルを集めよう！
ja.Nice! Keep playing to 500 points!: いいね！500ポイントまで続けよう！
ja.This ice is stronger! Match twice to bre: この氷は強い！2回マッチして壊そう！
ja.Now that's crunchy! Break it all! Fast!: これはカリカリ！全部壊そう！早く！
ja.Match next to Chests to unlock them!: チェストの隣をマッチして解除しよう！
ja.Coins galor! Now collect your Waffles an: コインたっぷり！今度はワッフルとチェリーパイを集めよう！
ja.Hey! You can Match 5 with your new Boost: おい！新しいブースターで5つマッチできるよ！
ja.Try your new Booster to help you Match m: 新しいブースターを試してもっとマッチしよう！
ja.Yum! Chocolate Waffles! They require two: うまい！チョコレートワッフル！2回マッチしないと集められない！
ja.Choco-tastic! Now collect the items in 2: チョコタスティック！25ムーブでアイテムを集めよう！
ja.Try this and see what happens!: 試してみてどうなるか見てみよう！
ja.Come back tomorrow for more rewards!: 明日また報酬をもらいに来てね！
ja.Get more boosters!: もっとブースターを手に入れよう！
ja.Use these to boost your game!: これを使ってゲームを強化しよう！
ja.Use the swap booster to change the place: スワップブースターを使ってクッキーの位置を入れ替えよう！
ja.Use the star wand to crush one cookie!\": スターの杖を使ってクッキーをひとつ壊そう！

it.Your level progress will be lost!: Il progresso del livello andrà perso!
it.Watch a video to continue playing!: Guarda un video per continuare a giocare!
it.Use the swap booster to change the place: Usa il potenziamento swap per scambiare due biscotti!
it.Use the star wand to crush one cookie!: Usa la bacchetta stellare per schiacciare un biscotto!
it.Use the horizontal pin to clear the whol: Usa la spilla orizzontale per pulire tutta la fila!
it.Use the vertical pin to clear the whole: Usa la spilla verticale per pulire tutta la colonna!
it.Nice job! You earned 3 stars! Enjoy your: Bel lavoro! Hai guadagnato 3 stelle! Goditi il tuo regalo!
it.Nice job! You won 3 times in a row! Enjo: Bel lavoro! Hai vinto 3 volte di fila! Goditi il tuo regalo!
it.Watch video to get more: Guarda un video per ottenere di più
it.You watched all videos for today. Come b: Hai visto tutti i video per oggi. Torna domani!
it.The cookies are on waffles! Save them by: I biscotti sono sulle cialde! Salvali facendo abbinamenti!
it.Keep matching and remove all waffles!: Continua ad abbinare e rimuovi tutte le cialde!
it.Save the cookies from the blocker by mat: Salva i biscotti dal blocco abbinandoli!
it.Make matches around the ice to break it!: Fai abbinamenti intorno al ghiaccio per romperlo!!
it.Stones block the cookies! Match blocked: Le pietre bloccano i biscotti! Abbina i biscotti bloccati per rimuovere la pietra!
it.Crunch! Now, collect more delicious blue: Crunch! Ora raccogli più biscotti blu deliziosi!
it.Stop infections from spreading! Make a m: Ferma la diffusione delle infezioni! Fai un abbinamento accanto a un’infezione per rimuoverla!
it.Complete missions to receive rewards!: Completa le missioni per ricevere ricompense!
it.I need an extra life!: Ho bisogno di una vita extra!
it.I need help with a gate!: Ho bisogno di aiuto con un cancello!
it.Bring the strawberries to the bottom of: Porta le fragole in fondo abbinando sotto di loro!
it.Did you notice? Matching 4 gives you a s: Hai notato? Abbinare 4 ti dà una sorpresa speciale!
it.Crunch! Now reach 2000 Points in 24 Move: Crunch! Ora raggiungi 2000 punti in 24 mosse!
it.Nice! Now match the bombs to make cookie: Bravo! Ora abbina le bombe per far esplodere i biscotti!
it.Match around the Ice to break it!: Abbina intorno al ghiaccio per romperlo!
it.Great! Now break all the ice and collect: Grande! Ora rompi tutto il ghiaccio e raccogli le tue cialde!
it.Nice! Keep playing to 500 points!: Bravo! Continua a giocare fino a 500 punti!
it.This ice is stronger! Match twice to bre: Questo ghiaccio è più forte! Abbina due volte per romperlo!
it.Now that's crunchy! Break it all! Fast!: Adesso è croccante! Rompi tutto! Velocemente!
it.Match next to Chests to unlock them!: Abbina accanto agli scrigni per sbloccarli!
it.Coins galor! Now collect your Waffles an: Monete a volontà! Ora raccogli le tue cialde e crostate di ciliegia!
it.Hey! You can Match 5 with your new Boost: Ehi! Puoi abbinare 5 con il tuo nuovo potenziamento!
it.Try your new Booster to help you Match m: Prova il tuo nuovo potenziamento per aiutarti ad abbinare di più!
it.Yum! Chocolate Waffles! They require two: Mmm! Cialde al cioccolato! Servono due abbinamenti per raccoglierle!
it.Choco-tastic! Now collect the items in 2: Choco-tastic! Ora raccogli gli oggetti in 25 mosse!
it.Try this and see what happens!: Prova questo e guarda cosa succede!
it.Use these to boost your game!: Usali per migliorare il tuo gioco!
it.Use the swap booster to change the place: Usa il potenziamento swap per scambiare due biscotti!
it.Use the star wand to crush one cookie!\": Usa la bacchetta stellare per schiacciare un biscotto!

id.Use the swap booster to change the place: Gunakan booster tukar untuk menukar dua kue!
id.Use the star wand to crush one cookie!: Gunakan tongkat bintang untuk menghancurkan satu kue!
id.Use the horizontal pin to clear the whol: Gunakan pin horizontal untuk membersihkan seluruh baris!
id.Use the vertical pin to clear the whole: Gunakan pin vertikal untuk membersihkan seluruh kolom!
id.Nice job! You earned 3 stars! Enjoy your: Kerja bagus! Anda mendapat 3 bintang! Nikmati hadiahnya!
id.Nice job! You won 3 times in a row! Enjo: Kerja bagus! Anda menang 3 kali berturut-turut! Nikmati hadiahnya!
id.Watch video to get more: Tonton video untuk mendapatkan lebih banyak
id.You watched all videos for today. Come b: Anda sudah menonton semua video hari ini. Kembali besok!
id.The cookies are on waffles! Save them by: Kuenya di atas wafel! Selamatkan mereka dengan mencocokkan!
id.Keep matching and remove all waffles!: Terus cocokkan dan hapus semua wafel!
id.Save the cookies from the blocker by mat: Selamatkan kue dari penghalang dengan mencocokkannya!
id.Make matches around the ice to break it!: Cocokkan di sekitar es untuk memecahkannya!!
id.Stones block the cookies! Match blocked: Batu menghalangi kue! Cocokkan untuk menghapus batu!
id.Crunch! Now, collect more delicious blue: Krak! Sekarang kumpulkan lebih banyak kue biru lezat!
id.Stop infections from spreading! Make a m: Hentikan infeksi menyebar! Cocokkan di sebelahnya untuk menghapus!
id.Bring the strawberries to the bottom of: Bawa stroberi ke bawah dengan mencocokkan di bawahnya!
id.Did you notice? Matching 4 gives you a s: Kamu perhatikan? Mencocokkan 4 memberi kejutan spesial!
id.Nice! Now match the bombs to make cookie: Bagus! Cocokkan bom untuk meledakkan kue!
id.Match around the Ice to break it!: Cocokkan di sekitar Es untuk memecahkannya!
id.Great! Now break all the ice and collect: Bagus! Hancurkan semua es dan kumpulkan wafel!
id.This ice is stronger! Match twice to bre: Es ini lebih kuat! Cocokkan dua kali untuk memecahkannya!
id.Match next to Chests to unlock them!: Cocokkan di dekat Peti untuk membukanya!
id.Coins galor! Now collect your Waffles an: Banjir koin! Kumpulkan Wafel dan Pai Ceri!
id.Hey! You can Match 5 with your new Boost: Hei! Kamu bisa cocokkan 5 dengan Booster baru!
id.Try your new Booster to help you Match m: Gunakan Booster barumu untuk mencocokkan lebih banyak!
id.Yum! Chocolate Waffles! They require two: Yum! Wafel Cokelat! Butuh dua kecocokan untuk dikumpulkan!
id.Try this and see what happens!: Coba ini dan lihat apa yang terjadi!
id.Come back tomorrow for more rewards!: Kembali besok untuk lebih banyak hadiah!
id.Use the swap booster to change the place: Gunakan booster tukar untuk menukar dua kue!
id.Use the star wand to crush one cookie!\": Gunakan tongkat bintang untuk menghancurkan satu kue!

fr.Your level progress will be lost!: Votre progression dans le niveau sera perdue !
fr.Watch a video to continue playing!: Regardez une vidéo pour continuer à jouer !
fr.Use the swap booster to change the place: Utilisez le booster d’échange pour intervertir deux biscuits !
fr.Use the star wand to crush one cookie!: Utilisez la baguette étoilée pour écraser un biscuit !
fr.Use the horizontal pin to clear the whol: Utilisez l’épingle horizontale pour nettoyer toute la rangée !
fr.Use the vertical pin to clear the whole: Utilisez l’épingle verticale pour nettoyer toute la colonne !
fr.Nice job! You earned 3 stars! Enjoy your: Bien joué ! Vous avez gagné 3 étoiles ! Profitez de votre cadeau !
fr.Nice job! You won 3 times in a row! Enjo: Bravo ! Vous avez gagné 3 fois de suite ! Profitez de votre récompense !
fr.Watch video to get more: Regardez une vidéo pour en avoir plus
fr.You watched all videos for today. Come b: Vous avez regardé toutes les vidéos aujourd’hui. Revenez demain !
fr.The cookies are on waffles! Save them by: Les biscuits sont sur des gaufres ! Sauvez-les en faisant des associations !
fr.Keep matching and remove all waffles!: Continuez à faire des associations pour éliminer toutes les gaufres !
fr.Save the cookies from the blocker by mat: Libérez les biscuits du bloqueur en les associant !
fr.Make matches around the ice to break it!: Faites des associations autour de la glace pour la briser !!
fr.Stones block the cookies! Match blocked: Des pierres bloquent les biscuits ! Associez les biscuits bloqués pour retirer la pierre !
fr.Crunch! Now, collect more delicious blue: Croustillant ! Collectez encore plus de délicieux biscuits bleus !
fr.Stop infections from spreading! Make a m: Empêchez les infections de se propager ! Faites une association à côté pour les éliminer !
fr.Complete missions to receive rewards!: Terminez des missions pour recevoir des récompenses !
fr.I need help with a gate!: J’ai besoin d’aide pour franchir une porte !
fr.Bring the strawberries to the bottom of: Amenez les fraises en bas en les associant !
fr.Did you notice? Matching 4 gives you a s: Vous avez remarqué ? Associer 4 donne une surprise !
fr.Nice! Now match the bombs to make cookie: Bien ! Associez les bombes pour faire exploser les biscuits !
fr.Match around the Ice to break it!: Associez autour de la glace pour la briser !
fr.Great! Now break all the ice and collect: Super ! Brisez toute la glace et récupérez vos gaufres !
fr.This ice is stronger! Match twice to bre: Cette glace est plus résistante ! Faites deux associations pour la briser !
fr.Match next to Chests to unlock them!: Faites des associations près des coffres pour les ouvrir !
fr.Coins galor! Now collect your Waffles an: Plein de pièces ! Récupérez vos gaufres et tartes aux cerises !
fr.Hey! You can Match 5 with your new Boost: Hé ! Associez 5 avec votre nouveau booster !
fr.Try your new Booster to help you Match m: Essayez votre nouveau booster pour faire plus d’associations !
fr.Yum! Chocolate Waffles! They require two: Miam ! Gaufres au chocolat ! Deux associations sont nécessaires !
fr.Choco-tastic! Now collect the items in 2: Choco-fantastique ! Collectez les objets en 25 coups !
fr.Try this and see what happens!: Essayez ceci et voyez ce qui se passe !
fr.Come back tomorrow for more rewards!: Revenez demain pour plus de récompenses !
fr.Use the swap booster to change the place: Utilisez le booster d’échange pour changer la place de deux biscuits !
fr.Use the star wand to crush one cookie!\": Utilisez la baguette étoilée pour écraser un biscuit !

de.Use the swap booster to change the place: Verwende den Tausch-Booster, um zwei Kekse zu vertauschen!
de.Use the star wand to crush one cookie!: Verwende den Sternstab, um einen Keks zu zerstören!
de.Use the horizontal pin to clear the whol: Verwende die horizontale Nadel, um die ganze Reihe zu leeren!
de.Use the vertical pin to clear the whole: Verwende die vertikale Nadel, um die ganze Spalte zu leeren!
de.Nice job! You earned 3 stars! Enjoy your: Gut gemacht! Du hast 3 Sterne erhalten! Viel Spaß mit deinem Geschenk!
de.Nice job! You won 3 times in a row! Enjo: Super! Du hast 3 Mal hintereinander gewonnen! Viel Spaß mit deinem Geschenk!
de.Watch video to get more: Video ansehen, um mehr zu erhalten
de.You watched all videos for today. Come b: Du hast heute alle Videos angesehen. Komm morgen wieder!
de.The cookies are on waffles! Save them by: Die Kekse liegen auf Waffeln! Rette sie durch Kombinationen!
de.Keep matching and remove all waffles!: Kombiniere weiter und entferne alle Waffeln!
de.Save the cookies from the blocker by mat: Rette die Kekse vor dem Blocker, indem du sie kombinierst!
de.Make matches around the ice to break it!: Kombiniere um das Eis herum, um es zu brechen!
de.Stones block the cookies! Match blocked: Steine blockieren die Kekse! Kombiniere sie, um die Steine zu entfernen!
de.Crunch! Now, collect more delicious blue: Knack! Sammle jetzt mehr leckere blaue Kekse!
de.Stop infections from spreading! Make a m: Stoppe die Infektion! Kombiniere neben ihr, um sie zu beseitigen!
de.I need help with a gate!: Ich brauche Hilfe bei einem Tor!
de.Bring the strawberries to the bottom of: Bringe die Erdbeeren nach unten, indem du darunter kombinierst!
de.Watch a video to try again: Video ansehen, um es erneut zu versuchen
de.Crunch! Now reach 2000 Points in 24 Move: Knack! Erreiche jetzt 2000 Punkte in 24 Zügen!
de.Nice! Now match the bombs to make cookie: Super! Kombiniere jetzt Bomben, um Kekse explodieren zu lassen!
de.Match around the Ice to break it!: Kombiniere um das Eis herum, um es zu brechen!
de.Great! Now break all the ice and collect: Super! Zerbrich alles Eis und sammle deine Waffeln!
de.Nice! Keep playing to 500 points!: Gut gemacht! Spiele weiter bis 500 Punkte!
de.This ice is stronger! Match twice to bre: Dieses Eis ist stärker! Kombiniere zweimal, um es zu brechen!
de.Match next to Chests to unlock them!: Kombiniere neben Truhen, um sie zu öffnen!
de.Coins galor! Now collect your Waffles an: Münzenregen! Sammle jetzt deine Waffeln und Kirschkuchen!
de.Hey! You can Match 5 with your new Boost: Hey! Mit deinem neuen Booster kannst du 5 kombinieren!
de.Try your new Booster to help you Match m: Probiere deinen neuen Booster aus, um mehr zu kombinieren!
de.Yum! Chocolate Waffles! They require two: Mmm! Schoko-Waffeln! Du brauchst zwei Kombinationen, um sie zu sammeln!
de.Choco-tastic! Now collect the items in 2: Schoko‑tastisch! Sammle jetzt die Gegenstände in 25 Zügen!
de.Try this and see what happens!: Probier das aus und sieh, was passiert!
de.Come back tomorrow for more rewards!: Komm morgen wieder für mehr Belohnungen!
de.Use these to boost your game!: Benutze sie, um dein Spiel zu verbessern!
de.Use the swap booster to change the place: Verwende den Tausch-Booster, um zwei Kekse zu vertauschen!
de.Use the star wand to crush one cookie!\": Verwende den Sternstab, um einen Keks zu zerstören!

es.Use the swap booster to change the place: Usa el potenciador de intercambio para cambiar dos galletas de lugar
es.Use the star wand to crush one cookie!: Usa la varita estelar para aplastar una galleta
es.Use the horizontal pin to clear the whol: Usa el alfiler horizontal para limpiar toda la fila
es.Use the vertical pin to clear the whole: Usa el alfiler vertical para limpiar toda la columna
es.Nice job! You won 3 times in a row! Enjo: ¡Buen trabajo! ¡Ganaste 3 veces seguidas! Disfruta tu regalo
es.You watched all videos for today. Come b: Has visto todos los videos del día. ¡Vuelve mañana!
es.The cookies are on waffles! Save them by: ¡Las galletas están sobre gofres! ¡Sálvalas haciendo combinaciones!
es.Keep matching and remove all waffles!: Sigue combinando y elimina todos los gofres
es.Make matches around the ice to break it!: ¡Haz combinaciones junto al hielo para romperlo!
es.Stones block the cookies! Match blocked: ¡Las piedras bloquean las galletas! Combina las galletas bloqueadas para eliminar la piedra
es.Crunch! Now, collect more delicious blue: ¡Crujido! Ahora, recoge más galletas azules deliciosas
es.Stop infections from spreading! Make a m: ¡Detén la infección! Combina junto a ella para eliminarla
es.Bring the strawberries to the bottom of: ¡Lleva las fresas al fondo haciendo combinaciones debajo!
es.Watch a video to try again: Mira un video para intentarlo de nuevo
es.Did you notice? Matching 4 gives you a s: ¿Lo notaste? ¡Combinar 4 te da una sorpresa especial!
es.Nice! Now match the bombs to make cookie: ¡Genial! Ahora combina las bombas para que las galletas exploten
es.Great! Now break all the ice and collect: ¡Genial! Ahora rompe todo el hielo y recoge tus gofres!
es.This ice is stronger! Match twice to bre: ¡Este hielo es más fuerte! ¡Combina dos veces para romperlo!
es.Match next to Chests to unlock them!: ¡Combina junto a los cofres para desbloquearlos!
es.Coins galor! Now collect your Waffles an: ¡Monedas por montón! Ahora recoge tus gofres y tartas de cereza
es.Try your new Booster to help you Match m: ¡Prueba tu nuevo potenciador para ayudarte a combinar más!
es.Yum! Chocolate Waffles! They require two: ¡Mmm! ¡Gofres de chocolate! Requieren dos combinaciones para recogerse
es.Choco-tastic! Now collect the items in 2: ¡Choco‑fantástico! Ahora recoge los objetos en 25 movimientos
es.Use the swap booster to change the place: Usa el potenciador de intercambio para cambiar dos galletas de lugar
es.Use the star wand to crush one cookie!\": Usa la varita estelar para aplastar una galleta

en.Your level progress will be lost!: Your level progress will be lost!
en.Watch a video to continue playing!: Watch a video to continue playing!
en.Use the swap booster to change the place: Use the swap booster to change the place of two cookies!
en.Use the star wand to crush one cookie!: Use the star wand to crush one cookie!
en.Use the horizontal pin to clear the whol: Use the horizontal pin to clear the whole row!
en.Use the vertical pin to clear the whole: Use the vertical pin to clear the whole column!
en.Nice job! You earned 3 stars! Enjoy your: Nice job! You earned 3 stars! Enjoy your gift!
en.Nice job! You won 3 times in a row! Enjo: Nice job! You won 3 times in a row! Enjoy your gift!
en.You watched all videos for today. Come b: You watched all videos for today. Come back tomorrow!
en.This is how you Match 3 Cookies: This is how you Match 3 Cookies
en.The cookies are on waffles! Save them by: The cookies are on waffles! Save them by making matches!
en.Keep matching and remove all waffles!: Keep matching and remove all waffles!
en.Save the cookies from the blocker by mat: Save the cookies from the blocker by matching them!
en.Make matches around the ice to break it!: Make matches around the ice to break it!!
en.Stones block the cookies! Match blocked: Stones block the cookies! Match blocked cookies to remove the stone!
en.Crunch! Now, collect more delicious blue: Crunch! Now, collect more delicious blue cookies!
en.Stop infections from spreading! Make a m: Stop infections from spreading! Make a match next to an infection to remove it!
en.I need help with a gate!: I need help with a gate!
en.Bring the strawberries to the bottom of: Bring the strawberries to the bottom of the floor by matching below them!
en.Watch a video to try again: Watch a video to try again
en.Did you notice? Matching 4 gives you a s: Did you notice? Matching 4 gives you a special surprise!
en.Crunch! Now reach 2000 Points in 24 Move: Crunch! Now reach 2000 Points in 24 Moves!
en.Nice! Now match the bombs to make cookie: Nice! Now match the bombs to make cookies explode!
en.Match around the Ice to break it!: Match around the Ice to break it!
en.Great! Now break all the ice and collect: Great! Now break all the ice and collect your waffles!
en.This ice is stronger! Match twice to bre: This ice is stronger! Match twice to break it!
en.Now that's crunchy! Break it all! Fast!: Now that's crunchy! Break it all! Fast!
en.Match next to Chests to unlock them!: Match next to Chests to unlock them!
en.Coins galor! Now collect your Waffles an: Coins galore! Now collect your Waffles and Cherry Pies!
en.Hey! You can Match 5 with your new Boost: Hey! You can Match 5 with your new Booster!
en.Try your new Booster to help you Match m: Try your new Booster to help you Match more!
en.Yum! Chocolate Waffles! They require two: Yum! Chocolate Waffles! They require two matches to collect!
en.Choco-tastic! Now collect the items in 2: Choco-tastic! Now collect the items in 25 moves!
en.Try this and see what happens!: Try this and see what happens!
en.Come back tomorrow for more rewards!: Come back tomorrow for more rewards!
en.Use these to boost your game!: Use these to boost your game!
en.Use the swap booster to change the place: Use the swap booster to change the place of two cookies!
